name: venture-studio
description: 6-step pipeline that takes a seed idea from audience discovery through business model validation to execution. Each step runs research agents in parallel, synthesizes findings, and lets you decide what graduates to the next phase.

BRAVE_API_KEY.description: Brave Search API key for web research

skills.name: start
skills.description: Initialize a new project with audience and seed idea

skills.name: run
skills.description: Run all methodologies for the current step

skills.name: graduate
skills.description: Review outputs, select winners, advance to next step

skills.name: studio
skills.description: View all projects and their status

postInstall.message: Venture Studio is ready! Run /start "your seed idea" to begin.
